zh.of North Denchworth, Berkshire, England: 英國英格蘭波克夏丹華斯
zh.North Denchworth, Berks, England: 英國英格蘭波克夏丹華斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Almeric Fettiplace於大約1278年出生在英國波克夏丹華斯時，他的父親Almeric Fettiplace33歲，母親Joan Denchworth29歲。他於大約1304年與Margaret Bocland在英國英格蘭波克夏結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1348年之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.of North Denchworth, Berkshire, England: 英国英格兰波克夏丹華斯
zh-hans.North Denchworth, Berks, England: 英国英格兰波克夏丹華斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Almeric Fettiplace于大约1278年出生在英国波克夏丹華斯时，他的父亲Almeric Fettiplace33岁，母亲Joan Denchworth29岁。他于大约1304年与Margaret Bocland在英国英格兰波克夏结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1348年之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Fettiplace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: nickname from the Anglo-Norman French phrase fete place ‘make room’, perhaps for an usher.

nameMeanings.name: Almeric
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Learned form of Aubrey , derived from Latin Albericus in the 14th century. It enjoyed a slight and brief vogue in the 19th century, but is now rare.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Almeric Fettiplace was born about 1278, in Denchworth, Berkshire, England, his father, Almeric Fettiplace, was 33 and his mother, Joan Denchworth, was 29. He married Margaret Bocland about 1304, in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died after 1348, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Almeric Fettiplace est né environ 1278, à Denchworth, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Almeric Fettiplace, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan Denchworth, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Bocland environ 1304, à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé après 1348, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Almeric Fettiplace um 1278 in Denchworth, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Almeric Fettiplace 33 und seine Mutter Joan Denchworth 29. Er hat um 1304 in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Bocland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb nach 1348 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Almeric Fettiplace è nato il circa 1278 nel Denchworth, Berkshire, England, il suo padre, Almeric Fettiplace, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Joan Denchworth, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Bocland circa 1304, nel Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì dopo il 1348, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Almeric Fettiplaceが約1278年にイギリスバークシュアイアデンチウオルスで生まれた時，父Almeric Fettiplaceは33歳，母Joan Denchworthは29歳であった。約1304年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアでMargaret Boclandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1348年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Almeric Fettiplace(이)가 대략 1278년 영국 버크실르 덴ch워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Almeric Fettiplace(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Denchworth(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1304년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에서 Margaret Bocland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1348년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Almeric Fettiplace nasceu aproximadamente 1278, em Denchworth, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Almeric Fettiplace, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan Denchworth, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Bocland aproximadamente 1304, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1348, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Almeric Fettiplace родился около 1278 г. в местности денчворт, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Almeric Fettiplace было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Denchworth, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Bocland около 1304 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер после 1348 г. в его родном городе.

sm.about 1278–after 1348: e tusa o le 1278–ina ua ma'ea le 1348

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Almeric Fettiplace nació aproximadamente 1278, en Denchworth, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Almeric Fettiplace, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Joan Denchworth, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Margaret Bocland aproximadamente 1304, en Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió después de 1348, en su pueblo.
